subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! Bear thou witness within thine own self that verily there is none other God but Him, and that He hath ever been wise concerning all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا ان اشهد فی نفسک بانه لا اله الا هو و انه کان بکل شیء حکیما و عنده
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
